targets.title: Two plus two is four
targets.challenge_full:
import Mathlib

namespace Submission

/-- Smoke target: two plus two is four. -/
theorem nat_two_plus_two_eq_four : (2 : Nat) + 2 = 4 := by
  sorry

end Submission
targets.submission_stub:
import Mathlib

namespace Submission

theorem nat_two_plus_two_eq_four : (2 : Nat) + 2 = 4 := by
  sorry

end Submission

human_proof_reference.citation: Elementary arithmetic: normalizing natural-number numerals gives 4.

attribution.license_note: Public-domain mathematical fact; statement curated for Lemma smoke testing.

review.duplicate_check: Smoke target intentionally overlaps elementary Mathlib capability; not launch-quality theorem supply.
review.statement_faithfulness: Direct formal statement of the elementary arithmetic fact.
review.notes: Use to test local LLM proof generation and submit/verify UX.

targets.title: Conjunction is commutative
targets.type_expr: ∀ p q : Prop, p ∧ q → q ∧ p
targets.challenge_full:
import Mathlib

namespace Submission

/-- Smoke target: conjunction can be flipped. -/

  sorry

end Submission

targets.title: Adding zero on the right
targets.challenge_full:
import Mathlib

namespace Submission

/-- Smoke target: adding zero on the right leaves a natural number unchanged. -/
theorem nat_add_zero_right (n : Nat) : n + 0 = n := by
  sorry

end Submission
